<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Stub; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Invocation; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class ReturnArgument implements Stub { private int $argumentIndex; public function __construct(int $argumentIndex) { $this->argumentIndex = $argumentIndex; } public function invoke(Invocation $invocation): mixed { return $invocation->parameters()[$this->argumentIndex] ?? null; } }
